author: MyAnimeList News
text:
'Wasted Chef' Movie Unveils Teaser Visual
The Annecy Animation Showcase presentation at the 79th Cannes International Film Festival revealed a teaser visual for director Takayuki Hirao's original anime project, titled Wasted Chef. Staff Director, Screenplay: Takayuki Hirao (Kara no Kyoukai Movie 5: Mujun Rasen) Character Design: Shingo Adachi (Sword Art Online) Music: Kenta Matsukuma (Eiga Daisuki Pompo-san) Producer: Ryouichirou Matsuo (Natsu e no Tunnel, Sayonara no Deguchi), Yuunosuke Uno (Witch Watch), Kousuke Arai (Tokidoki Bo...

author: MyAnimeList News
text:
Manga 'Gigant' Receives Anime Movie
The K2 Pictures press conference at the Cannes Film Festival in France announced an anime movie adaptation of Hiroya Oku's Gigant manga on Sunday. The project marks K2 Pictures' first venture into animation production. Oku (Gantz) launched the sci-fi seinen manga in Big Comic Superior magazine in December 2017. Shogakukan published the tenth and final volume in December 2021. Gigant has a cumulative 1.2 million copies of its volumes in circulation. Seven Seas Entertainment licensed the...
